group.label: "View Other" Button Labels
group.comment: Labels for the PDP "View Other" buttons. Configurable per store view. Blank fields fall back to the defaults.

field.label: Buttons to show
field.comment: Tick which "View Other" buttons appear (storefront + admin product form). Add or remove a button here with no code change.

field.label: Strip old in-description buttons
field.comment: Removes the old hand-coded "View Other …" anchors (and button-styled links) from the product description as it renders, so they don't show twice. The stored description is left untouched — turn this off to show it exactly as written.

group.label: Auto-Generated Links (Dynamic)
group.comment: When ON, products WITHOUT a manually-set link get a "View Other" link generated automatically from their own category + Manufacturer / Finish / Size. Manual per-product links always take priority. Options = the brand's range in the category; Finishes = vary finish; Sizes = vary size (needs a size attribute mapped for the category).

field.label: Default "size" attribute code
field.comment: Used for the Sizes button when a category has no specific mapping below. Leave blank to only show Sizes where mapped.

field.label: Per-category size attribute map
field.comment: One per line: category-url-path=attribute_code. E.g. euro-double-cylinders-locks=length. Tells the Sizes button which attribute is "size" for that category.

group.label: Custom Buttons (Advanced)
group.comment:
Define your OWN "View Other …" buttons with no code. One per line: Button Label|attributes_to_keep_the_same.
The button links to other products in the same category with those attributes held to this product's values, so everything else varies. Use __size__ for the per-category size attribute (mapped above). A button is hidden on any product missing one of the held attributes.
Examples:
View Other Colours|manufacturer,finish,__size__  (same brand + finish + size → colour varies)
View Other Lengths|manufacturer,finish  (same brand + finish → length/size varies)
Lines starting with # are ignored.
